Label: Section 1.1
Issue: Does not specify the format for the PCAP file
Correction: The system shall accept PCAP files in the standard libpcap format.

Label: Section 1.1
Issue: Does not specify the supported scaling methods
Correction: The system shall support min-max scaling and standard scaling methods.

Label: Section 1.1
Issue: Does not specify the supported normalization methods
Correction: The system shall support L1, L2, and max normalization methods.

Label: Section 1.1
Issue: Does not specify the format for saving configurations
Correction: The system shall save configurations in JSON format.

Label: Section 1.1
Issue: Does not specify the format for saving sessions
Correction: The system shall save sessions in a compressed ZIP format containing all necessary files.

Label: Section 2.1.1
Issue: Does not specify the file formats for exporting graphs
Correction: The system shall support exporting graphs in PNG, JPEG, and PDF formats.

Label: Section 2.1.1
Issue: Does not specify the default values for the optimizer
Correction: The default optimizer shall be Adam with a learning rate of 0.001.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the maximum file size for PCAP files
Correction: The system shall support PCAP files up to 2GB in size.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of hidden layers
Correction: The system shall support up to 10 hidden layers in the autoencoder configuration.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of nodes per hidden layer
Correction: The system shall support up to 1024 nodes per hidden layer.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the supported loss functions
Correction: The system shall support MSE, MAE, and Cross-Entropy loss functions.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the supported optimizers
Correction: The system shall support Adam, SGD, and RMSprop optimizers.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the format for the performance analysis graphs
Correction: The performance analysis graphs shall be displayed in a line chart format.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the format for the network topology graph
Correction: The network topology graph shall be displayed in a force-directed graph format.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the format for the results graph
Correction: The results graph shall be displayed in a scatter plot format.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the supported protocols for filtering
Correction: The system shall support filtering by TCP, UDP, and ICMP protocols.

Correction: The popup box shall display information in a structured table format.

Label: Section 2.2.1

Correction: The system shall support saving up to 100 configurations.
